all_reviews.review_text: Average capacity. Capacity is adequate for day trips. It's okay for casual use.
Five stars for the capacity! More capacity than I expected. Worth every penny.
Really frustrated with the ankle support. Twisted my ankle because the support is so poor. Customer service wasn't helpful either.
Great capacity! Fits everything I need for a 3-day trip. Perfect for my summer adventures.
The TrailBlazer Running Shoes exceeded my expectations. The durability is top-notch. Exceptional build quality.
After extensive testing, the durability holds up beautifully. Built like a tank — no signs of wear after a full season. Very satisfied.
The grip completely ruined my summer trip. Lost traction on every downhill. Unacceptable quality.
The weight meets basic expectations. Not the lightest, not the heaviest. Nothing to write home about.
Terrible comfort. The padding wears out within weeks. This does not live up to the brand's reputation.
The durability completely ruined my summer trip. Material started peeling almost immediately. Unacceptable quality.
The price is subpar. Massively overpriced for what you get. I've had much better from competitors.

Very disappointed with the price. Not worth the premium markup. Expected much better for the price.
